title: Login with valid credentials redirects to Client Panel
description: Verifies that a user can log in with email/password and is taken to the client panel after successful authentication.

title: Login with invalid credentials shows an error
description: Verifies that the login form displays an invalid-credentials message when the password is wrong.

title: Navigate from Login to Register page
description: Verifies that a user can reach the registration page from the login page using the register link.

steps.description: Click "Register" link to navigate to registration

title: Registration with weak password shows validation error
description: Verifies that the registration form blocks weak passwords and shows a visible validation message.

steps.description: Fill registration form fields with a new email and a weak password
Verify text "Password too weak" is visible

title: Navigate from Homepage header navigation to Booking page and see booking form
description: Verifies a user can reach the Booking page from the Homepage using a navigation link and the booking form is visible.

steps.description: Scroll to the services overview section
Click on the "Booking" navigation link in the header

title: Homepage booking CTA button navigates to Booking page and booking form loads (happy path)
description: Verifies the primary booking call-to-action on the Homepage takes the user to the Booking page and the form is visible.

steps.description: Click on the booking CTA button in the hero section

title: Scroll through Homepage sections and confirm key sections render
description: Verifies the Homepage can be scrolled end-to-end and key sections (services, reviews, footer) are visible.

steps.description: Scroll to the services overview section

title: Interact with reviews slider controls and confirm review content changes
description: Verifies the reviews slider is usable and navigating the slider changes the visible review content.

steps.description: Click on the reviews slider "Next" control
Click on the reviews slider "Previous" control

title: Footer legal links include KVKK and navigate correctly
description: Verifies that the Homepage footer contains a KVKK legal link and it opens the correct legal page.

steps.description: Click on the "KVKK" link in the footer

title: Footer legal links include Privacy Policy and navigate correctly
description: Verifies that the Homepage footer contains a Privacy link and it opens the privacy policy page.

steps.description: Click on the "Privacy" link in the footer

title: Submit a booking request successfully and see confirmation
description: Verifies a user can complete the booking form with a valid date/time and contact info and sees a confirmation message.

title: Booking page loads and allows selecting a date
description: Verifies the booking page renders and the user can interact with the appointment date control.

title: Cannot submit booking with missing contact information
description: Verifies the form blocks submission and shows validation messaging when contact information is not provided.

title: Cannot submit booking with date not selected
description: Verifies the form blocks submission and shows validation messaging when an appointment date is not selected.

title: Cannot submit booking with time not selected
description: Verifies the form blocks submission and shows validation messaging when an appointment time is not selected.

title: Admin can access /admin after logging in and sees the dashboard
description: Verifies that a user can log in with valid credentials and land on the Admin Dashboard.

title: Admin can switch between key admin tabs and each tab content is visible
description: Verifies that tab switching works across multiple areas of the admin panel.

title: Admin creates a new blog post and sees it listed in Blog tab
description: Verifies end-to-end blog post creation from the admin Blog tab and confirms it appears in the list.

steps.description: Click the "Create New Blog Post" button
Type "E2E Test Post" into the Title field

title: Admin saves a newly created blog post and verifies it appears in the Blog list
description: Verifies saving a blog post results in a visible entry in the Blog tab list.

steps.description: Click the "Create New Blog Post" button
Type "E2E Test Post - Save" into the Title field

title: Invalid login prevents access to admin dashboard
description: Verifies that incorrect credentials do not grant access to the Admin Dashboard.

title: Admin can open and view Accounting tab content
description: Verifies that the Accounting section is reachable and renders visible content.

title: Admin can open and view Site Configuration tab content
description: Verifies that the site configuration area is accessible from the admin dashboard and shows config UI.

title: View upcoming appointments in Client Panel (authenticated)
description: Verifies an authenticated user can access the Client Panel and see upcoming appointments.

steps.description: Verify an element "Upcoming appointments list" is visible

title: Edit profile and save changes successfully (authenticated)
description: Verifies an authenticated user can edit profile fields and sees a success confirmation after saving.

steps.description: Fill "Updated Test Name" into the "Full name" field

title: Cancel out of profile editing without saving (authenticated)
description: Verifies a user can enter edit mode and exit without seeing a save confirmation.

steps.description: Verify text "Profile updated" is not visible

title: Profile information is visible on Client Panel (authenticated)
description: Verifies the Client Panel shows the user's profile information section when logged in.

steps.description: Verify an element "Profile information" is visible

title: Client Panel access from homepage via client panel link (authenticated)
description: Verifies a logged-in user can reach the Client Panel using an in-app navigation link rather than direct URL navigation.

title: Client Panel remains inaccessible with invalid login credentials
description: Verifies invalid credentials prevent login and do not grant access to the Client Panel.

title: Upcoming appointments section handles empty state (authenticated)
description: Verifies the Client Panel shows a clear empty-state message when there are no upcoming appointments.

steps.description: Verify text "No upcoming appointments" is visible

title: Open Blog listing and see posts are displayed
description: Verifies the blog listing page loads and shows a list of blog posts visitors can browse.

steps.description: Verify at least one blog post item (a visible post title) is visible
Scroll to the bottom of the blog listing page
Verify at least one blog post item (a visible post title) is visible

title: Open a blog post from the listing and see full article content
description: Verifies a visitor can open a blog post and view the full article content.

steps.description: Verify at least one blog post item (a visible post title) is visible
Click on the first visible blog post title
Verify the opened page shows a visible article title
Verify the opened page shows visible article body content (a paragraph of text)
Verify the opened page shows a visible publish date or author section

title: Navigate back to the Blog listing from an opened article
description: Verifies a visitor can return to the blog listing after opening an article using an in-page navigation element.

steps.description: Click on the first visible blog post title
Verify the opened page shows a visible article title
Click on "Blog" or "Back to Blog" (whichever navigation link is present on the page)
Verify at least one blog post item (a visible post title) is visible

title: Blog listing remains usable when content is still loading (no broken UI)
description: Verifies the blog page shows a usable loading/empty state instead of broken content while posts are being fetched.

steps.description: Verify a visible loading indicator or placeholder content is visible if posts are not yet displayed
Wait for blog posts to appear
Verify at least one blog post item (a visible post title) is visible

title: Attempt to open a removed/deleted post and see an error state
description: Verifies the app shows an 'Article not found' or equivalent error state when a removed post is opened.

steps.description: Verify at least one blog post item (a visible post title) is visible
Click on a blog post item labeled as removed/unavailable if such an item is visible
Verify text "Article not found" is visible
Verify a visible link or button to return to the Blog listing is visible
Click on the visible "Back" or "Blog" return link

title: Submit contact form successfully with valid inputs
description: Verifies a visitor can submit the contact form with name, email, and message and sees a visible success confirmation.

steps.description: Type "Test User" into the name field
Type "Hello, I would like more information about your services." into the message textarea

title: Email required validation when submitting without email
description: Verifies the contact form blocks submission and shows a visible validation error when email is missing.

steps.description: Type "Test User" into the name field
Type "I am sending a message but leaving email empty to test validation." into the message textarea

title: Name required validation when submitting without name
description: Verifies the contact form blocks submission and shows a visible validation error when name is missing.

steps.description: Type "Testing submission with missing name." into the message textarea

title: Message required validation when submitting without message
description: Verifies the contact form blocks submission and shows a visible validation error when message is missing.

steps.description: Type "Test User" into the name field

title: Invalid email format validation on contact form
description: Verifies the contact form shows a visible error when an invalid email format is entered.

steps.description: Type "Test User" into the name field
Type "Testing invalid email validation." into the message textarea

title: Successful submission after correcting missing email
description: Verifies a user can trigger an email-required error, then fix it and submit successfully without leaving the page.

steps.description: Type "Test User" into the name field
Type "Testing fix-after-validation scenario." into the message textarea

title: No duplicate confirmation on repeated submit click after success
description: Verifies that after a successful contact submission, repeated clicking submit does not create multiple visible success confirmations.

steps.description: Type "Test User" into the name field
Type "Testing repeated submit behavior after success." into the message textarea

title: Contact page renders form fields and submit control
description: Verifies the contact page shows the expected visible inputs before any interaction.

title: Accept cookies dismisses the banner and keeps it dismissed during the session
description: Verifies the cookie consent banner appears on first visit and is dismissed after accepting cookies.

title: Reject cookies dismisses the banner
description: Verifies the cookie consent banner can be rejected and is dismissed afterward.

title: Cookie policy link opens the Cookies policy page from the banner
description: Verifies the banner provides navigation to the cookie policy page.

title: Closing the banner via Reject still allows navigation to Cookies page from footer/header
description: Verifies users can still reach the cookie policy page even after dismissing the banner.

steps.description: Scroll to the bottom of the page

title: Switch language on the homepage updates visible UI strings
description: Verifies that selecting a different language updates visible homepage text to that language.

steps.description: Verify element "Language" (or a globe/language selector control) is visible
Click on the language selector control
Click on a different language option than the current one (for example, "English" if currently Turkish)
Verify text on the homepage changes to the newly selected language (for example, a main heading or call-to-action text appears in the selected language)
Verify element "Services" (or the equivalent section label) is visible in the selected language

title: Language selection persists when navigating to another public page
description: Verifies that after switching languages, the selection remains active on another route reached via UI navigation.

steps.description: Click on the language selector control
Click on a different language option than the current one
Click on the "About" navigation link/menu item
Verify a prominent About-page heading or introductory text is visible in the selected language
Click on the "Home" navigation link/menu item
Verify text on the homepage is still visible in the selected language

title: Language switching works on the booking page
description: Verifies that language switching updates visible labels on the appointment booking page.

steps.description: Verify text "Booking" or a booking page heading is visible
Click on the language selector control
Click on a different language option than the current one
Verify the booking page heading (or primary call-to-action) is visible in the selected language
Verify at least one booking form label or instruction text is visible in the selected language

title: Language switching works on the contact page and updates form text
description: Verifies that switching language on the contact page updates visible contact form labels/instructions.

steps.description: Verify text "Contact" or a contact page heading is visible
Click on the language selector control
Click on a different language option than the current one
Verify the contact page heading is visible in the selected language
Verify at least one contact form label (for example "Name", "Email", or "Message") is visible in the selected language

title: Missing translations fall back to default language or fallback text
description: Verifies that when a translation key is missing in the selected language, the UI shows default-language text or a defined fallback rather than breaking.

steps.description: Click on the language selector control
Click on a language option that is most likely to have incomplete coverage (for example, a non-primary language if multiple are offered)
Click on the "Cookies" navigation link/menu item
Verify the page shows readable policy content text (not blank)
Verify no obvious missing-translation placeholder text is visible (for example, raw translation keys like "common." or "translation:")

title: Browser language detection sets an initial language on first load (observable via UI text)
description: Verifies the app loads with a consistent initial language that matches the browser language when available, observable via visible UI strings.

steps.description: Verify a prominent homepage heading is visible
Verify the same heading is consistently shown in one language (not mixed) across the hero and navigation labels
Click on the language selector control
Verify the currently active language option is indicated (for example, marked as selected or highlighted)
Click on the active language option to close the language selector (if it remains open)
Verify the homepage still shows text in the same initial language

title: Language switch does not require authentication and works on the login page
description: Verifies language switching is available and updates visible strings on the /login page without requiring a signed-in session.

steps.description: Verify text "Login" (or a login page heading) is visible
Click on the language selector control
Click on a different language option than the current one
Verify the login page heading is visible in the selected language
Verify at least one login form label (for example "Email" or "Password") is visible in the selected language

title: About page displays practitioner biography and credentials
description: Verifies the About page is reachable and shows core practitioner bio/credential content.

title: Methods page displays therapy methods list
description: Verifies the Methods page is reachable and shows a visible list/section of therapy methods.

steps.description: Verify element "Therapy methods list" is visible

title: Open a therapy method item to view details
description: Verifies that selecting a method on the Methods page reveals method details on the page.

steps.description: Verify element "Therapy methods list" is visible
Click on the first therapy method item
Verify element "Selected method details" is visible

title: KVKK page is accessible and shows KVKK disclosure content
description: Verifies the KVKK legal disclosure page loads and presents disclosure text.

steps.description: Verify element "KVKK disclosure content" is visible

title: Navigate from KVKK to Privacy policy using footer link
description: Verifies the footer link from KVKK to Privacy works and the Privacy policy content is visible.

steps.description: Click on the "Privacy" link in the footer
Verify element "Privacy policy content" is visible

title: Privacy policy page is accessible directly
description: Verifies the Privacy policy page loads and shows policy text.

steps.description: Verify element "Privacy policy content" is visible

title: Cookies policy page is accessible and shows cookie policy content
description: Verifies the Cookies policy page loads and presents cookie policy information.

steps.description: Verify element "Cookie policy content" is visible

title: Copyright page is accessible and shows copyright information
description: Verifies the Copyright page loads and shows copyright notice/information.

steps.description: Verify element "Copyright information content" is visible

title: Podcast page is accessible and shows episodes section
description: Verifies the Podcast page loads and displays podcast episodes content.

steps.description: Verify element "Podcast episodes list" is visible

title: YouTube page is accessible and shows YouTube content section
description: Verifies the YouTube content page loads and displays a visible list/section of YouTube content.

steps.description: Verify element "YouTube content list" is visible
